metadata.title: Log in | Slashie
metadata.description: Log in to Slashie to post tasks, send quotes, and manage your local marketplace account.

en.asideTitle: Get local tasks done with confidence.
en.asideDescription: Post a task, compare quotes from nearby workers, and manage everything in one place.
en.title: Log in to Slashie
en.description: Manage requests, quotes, and worker tools from one account.

metadata.title: 登入 | Slashie
metadata.description: 登入 Slashie，發佈任務、傳送報價，並管理你的本地服務帳戶。

zh_hk.asideDescription: 發佈任務、比較附近 worker 的報價，並在同一處管理所有事項。
zh_hk.title: 登入 Slashie
zh_hk.description: 用一個帳戶管理請求、報價和 worker 工具。
